---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Portoser
title: '[Feature] '
labels: ['enhancement']
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What is painful or missing today? Describe the use case, not the solution.

## Proposed solution

What you would like to see. Include a sketch of the API, UX, or config change if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Links to related issues, prior art in similar projects, screenshots, mockups, or anything else useful.
